name: mercedes-msrp
description: Fetches all current Mercedes-Benz China (mercedes-benz.com.cn) MSRP prices by model and trim. Returns prices in 万元.
author: MSRP Skill

input_schema.description: No inputs required. Fetches live data from the official Mercedes-Benz China bodystyle API.

model.description: Model class name in Chinese, e.g. C级

trim.description: Full trim name in Chinese, e.g. 长轴距C级轿车
